'''鈭歝h-s-m''' ('''kachasam''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hinder|hinder]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-s-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hinder|hinder]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-s-m
|-
! Lemma
| kachasam
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichasam|thichasam]] || [[word:jichasam|jichasam]] || [[word:shichasam|shichasam]] || [[word:kichasam|kichasam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchasam|thuthuchasam]] || [[word:jujuchasam|jujuchasam]] || [[word:shushuchasam|shushuchasam]] || [[word:kukuchasam|kukuchasam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuchasam|thuchasam]] || [[word:juchasam|juchasam]] || [[word:shuchasam|shuchasam]] || [[word:kuchasam|kuchasam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuchasam|thuchasam]] || [[word:juchasam|juchasam]] || [[word:shuchasam|shuchasam]] || [[word:kuchasam|kuchasam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thechasam|thechasam]] || [[word:jechasam|jechasam]] || [[word:shechasam|shechasam]] || [[word:kechasam|kechasam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothochasam|thothochasam]] || [[word:jojochasam|jojochasam]] || [[word:shoshochasam|shoshochasam]] || [[word:kokochasam|kokochasam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochasam|thochasam]] || [[word:jochasam|jochasam]] || [[word:shochasam|shochasam]] || [[word:kochasam|kochasam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochasam|thochasam]] || [[word:jochasam|jochasam]] || [[word:shochasam|shochasam]] || [[word:kochasam|kochasam]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:chasam|chasam]] || [[word:chasam|chasam]] || [[word:chasam|chasam]] || [[word:chasam|chasam]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:chasam|chasam]] || [[word:chasam|chasam]] || [[word:chasam|chasam]] || [[word:chasam|chasam]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:chasam|chasam]] || [[word:chasam|chasam]] || [[word:chasam|chasam]] || [[word:chasam|chasam]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:chasam|chasam]] || [[word:chasam|chasam]] || [[word:chasam|chasam]] || [[word:chasam|chasam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙chasam|th忙chasam]] || [[word:j忙chasam|j忙chasam]] || [[word:sh忙chasam|sh忙chasam]] || [[word:k忙chasam|k忙chasam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathachasam|thathachasam]] || [[word:jajachasam|jajachasam]] || [[word:shashachasam|shashachasam]] || [[word:kakachasam|kakachasam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachasam|thachasam]] || [[word:jachasam|jachasam]] || [[word:shachasam|shachasam]] || [[word:kachasam|kachasam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachasam|thachasam]] || [[word:jachasam|jachasam]] || [[word:shachasam|shachasam]] || [[word:kachasam|kachasam]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shachasam|shachasam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshachasam|goshachasam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishachasam|gokishachasam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shachasamn眉|shachasamn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshachasamnkn眉|goshachasamnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishachasamn眉|gokishachasamn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shachasamsh毛|shachasamsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshachasamnksh毛|goshachasamnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishachasamsh毛|gokishachasamsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachasamro|shachasamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachasamnkro|goshachasamnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachasamro|gokishachasamro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shachasammu|shachasammu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachasamnkmu|goshachasamnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachasammu|gokishachasammu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shachasamsher|shachasamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshachasamnksher|goshachasamnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishachasamsher|gokishachasamsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shachasamng|shachasamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshachasamnkng|goshachasamnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishachasamng|gokishachasamng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shachasamya|shachasamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshachasamnkya|goshachasamnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishachasamya|gokishachasamya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shachasamyam|shachasamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshachasamnkyam|goshachasamnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishachasamyam|gokishachasamyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachasamn眉sh毛|shachasamn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachasamnkn眉sh毛|goshachasamnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachasamn眉sh毛|gokishachasamn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachasamn眉ro|shachasamn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachasamnkn眉ro|goshachasamnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachasamn眉ro|gokishachasamn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachasamn眉mu|shachasamn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachasamnkn眉mu|goshachasamnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachasamn眉mu|gokishachasamn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachasamsh毛n眉|shachasamsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachasamnksh毛n眉|goshachasamnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachasamsh毛n眉|gokishachasamsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachasamsh毛ro|shachasamsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachasamnksh毛ro|goshachasamnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachasamsh毛ro|gokishachasamsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachasamsh毛mu|shachasamsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachasamnksh毛mu|goshachasamnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachasamsh毛mu|gokishachasamsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachasamron眉|shachasamron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachasamnkron眉|goshachasamnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachasamron眉|gokishachasamron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachasamrosh毛|shachasamrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachasamnkrosh毛|goshachasamnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachasamrosh毛|gokishachasamrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachasamromu|shachasamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachasamnkromu|goshachasamnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachasamromu|gokishachasamromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachasammun眉|shachasammun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachasamnkmun眉|goshachasamnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachasammun眉|gokishachasammun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachasammush毛|shachasammush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachasamnkmush毛|goshachasamnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachasammush毛|gokishachasammush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachasammuro|shachasammuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachasamnkmuro|goshachasamnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachasammuro|gokishachasammuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
